heading: Authorities
label: 10202 Authorities
notes: Effective DateSection effective on first day of first pay period which begins after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2010 Amendment note under .Oct. 15, 2010section 5 of Pub. L. 111–282section 5102 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective on first day of first pay period which begins after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2010 Amendment note under .Oct. 15, 2010section 5 of Pub. L. 111–282section 5102 of this title

children.text: fix and adjust rates of basic pay for members of the United States Secret Service Uniformed Division, subject to the requirements of this chapter;
determine what constitutes an acceptable level of competence for the purposes of section 10205;
establish and determine the positions at the Officer and Sergeant ranks to be included as technician positions; and
determine the rate of basic pay of a member who is changed or demoted to a lower rank, in accordance with section 10208.

children.heading: .—Delegation of Authority
children.label: b .—Delegation of Authority
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to delegate to the designated agent or agents of the Secretary, any power or function vested in the Secretary under in this chapter.1So in original.1

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: c .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary may prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to administer this chapter.
